detaileddescription.para: Left hand.
Right hand.
Number of hands.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Available hand types.
Maximum number of key points per hand.
Maximum number of key points per gesture.
The index ordering of 28 keypoints exposed in array keypoints_mask[MLHandTrackingStaticData_MaxKeyPoints] and left_frame/right_frame[MLHandTrackingStaticData_MaxKeyPoints].
No additional settings used.
Enable unfiltered keypoints. See MLHandTrackingGetStaticData for more details.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration of flags to select settings related to hand tracking.

detaileddescription.para: Filtered keypoints are always available, no matter the settings.
Available hand types.
The index ordering of 28 keypoints exposed in array keypoints_mask[MLHandTrackingStaticData_MaxKeyPoints] and left_frame/right_frame[MLHandTrackingStaticData_MaxKeyPoints].
See MLHandTrackingKeyPoint for more details.

briefdescription.para: Static information about a hand tracker.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLHandTrackingStaticDataInit() before use.
Same for both filtered and unfiltered keypoints.

briefdescription.para: Data which is received when querying hand tracker from MLHandTrackingGetData().

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLHandTrackingDataInit() before use.

briefdescription.para: Enumeration of flags to select settings related to hand tracking.

detaileddescription.para: Filtered keypoints are always available, no matter the settings.

briefdescription.para: Settings of the hand tracking system.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLHandTrackingSettingsInit().

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.
The object to initialize.
The object to initialize with default settings.

xrefdescription.para: Deprecated since 1.3.0. Scheduled for removal. Replaced by MLHandTrackingCreateEx.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to an MLHandle which will contain the handle of the hand tracker. If this operation fails, out_handle will be ML_INVALID_HANDLE.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
The tracker was created successfully.
The application lacks the required permission.
Failed to create the tracker.
A pointer to a previously initialized MLHandTrackingSettings struct.
A pointer to an MLHandle which will contain the handle of the hand tracker. If this operation fails, out_handle will be ML_INVALID_HANDLE.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
The tracker was created successfully.
The application lacks the required permission.
Failed to create the tracker.
A handle to a Hand Tracker created by MLHandTrackingCreateEx().
A pointer to a previously initialized MLHandTrackingSettings struct.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
The settings were updated successfully.
Failed to update the settings.
A handle to a Hand Tracker created by MLHandTrackingCreateEx().
It successfully destroyed the tracker.
Failed to destroy the tracker.

briefdescription.para: Queries the state of the hand tracker.

detaileddescription.para: The MLHandTrackingData is the same for both filtered and unfiltered keypoints.

parameterdescription.para: A handle to a Hand Tracker created by MLHandTrackingCreateEx().
Pointer to a variable that receives information about the tracked hands.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
The hand information was available and the information in out_data is valid.
Failed to get the hand information.

briefdescription.para: Gets static information about hand tracking system.

detaileddescription.para: See MLHandTrackingStaticData for more details.

parameterdescription.para: A handle to a Hand Tracker created by MLHandTrackingCreateEx().
Pointer to a variable that receives static data about the hand tracker.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
The hand information was available and the information in out_data is valid.
Failed to get the hand information.
